changes: EchoCoreService: Secured foreground lifecycle to prevent RemoteServiceException.
NsdHelper: Fully hardened multicast lock with permission/exception guards and state machine.
Watchdogs: Bounded recovery logic for NSD/Netty to prevent log spam.
Web Portal: Added Security Registry for renaming, blocking, and permission management for privileged peers.
Permissions: Server-side enforcement for all web portal file actions.
Stability: Isolated engine scopes and health-check based recovery.
